case_title: MURRAY NEAL VS MALTBY KEVIN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-01-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-08-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MALTBY KEVIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT MURRAY NEAL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,400.40 FILED BY MALTBY KEVIN FARMERS INSURANCE CO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MURRAY NEAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-08-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $405.11 FILED BY MURRAY NEAL AS TO DEFENDANT MALTBY KEVIN FARMERS INSURANCE CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
